title: agent
description: A native coding-agent target the harness can sync into (claude, codex, ...). Mirrors AGENT_TARGETS in src/agents.js.

dotFolder.description: Directory this agent's native config is synced into, e.g. ".claude"

agentFilename.description: Entrypoint instruction file written at the project root for this agent, e.g. "CLAUDE.md" or "AGENTS.md"

skillsSubpath.description: Path segment under dotFolder where skills live
